name: boxyhq-patterns-lab
description: Original SHIB-14 POC: BoxyHQ SaaS Starter enterprise patterns reimplemented for evaluation (not a fork).

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/policy/rbac.test.ts src/config/feature-flags.test.ts src/security/login-lockout.test.ts src/security/team-api-keys.test.ts src/tenancy/invitations.test.ts src/policy/authorize.test.ts src/app/team-console.test.ts src/observability/outbox.test.ts
